text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wanna break away and run far, far from the
Mejiro image that's been hanging over me. I
wanna escape, and when I do...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I want to live the way I want—as my own self and
without caring about what others think of me. I
mean, I'm me, aren't I?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, sure, that's what I want, but if that kinda
goal is so easy to achieve, then there'd be no
such thing as suffering in life!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
After all, you gotta have the confidence to push
yourself to live all-out, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But gaining that confidence is easier said than
done. After all, there are so many incredible
racers in this family...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family bears a prestigious name in the
Umamusume world. Many of them are regarded as
racers with great potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Take the ultimate stayer, Mejiro McQueen, for
instance. Then there's the buff powerhouse,
Mejiro Ryan, among others...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's nearly time for the intramural races to begin,
isn't it, Ryan? It'll be us Mejiros versus everyone
else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our objective is unilateral victory! You and I must
win our races, of course, but so must every other
Mejiro member!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Unilateral victory?! O-oh geez, don't you think
you're setting the bar a bit high?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure not everyone'll be able to win. They'll feel
real low, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Deep breaths, McQueen! No need to lay
on the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If that happens, then I'll go around and cheer
everyone up again! You can leave that stuff to me
and focus on your own race, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Keeping things civil was always my job. Cooling
off McQueen, helping Ryan out. But all that...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not so much that I'm doin' that out of the
kindness of my heart. I'm actually just trying my
best to stand out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Making sure things run smoothly is the role I
play in the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
McQueen's endurance is legendary and Ryan's a
literal speed demon. The only thing I can really
contribute to the family is my charm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But that's important too, you know? Every family
needs a mediator that keeps the peace and
coordinates stuff. Except...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Once that mediator steps out the door, she's just
a plain old Umamusume who's not even worth a
second glance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? I just want to be sure, but... Are you
positive I'm the one you want to work with?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now's your last chance to switch trainees. I'd
totes get it if you wanna switch, so I won't get
mad if you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So lemme ask you again. Am I really the one you
want for the Twinkle Series?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No one in the Mejiro family thinks I'll amount to
much, and I'm super self-conscious about what
others think of me. You're still okay with that?
choice_data_list: Yep. I want you to go down in history.
Yep. I want you to go down in history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Ahaha! We might be peas in a pod. Neither
of us are willing to leave others out in the cold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thanks. But lemme say something first...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't lying about what I said earlier—about
wanting to live my way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All my life, I've been forcing myself to act "more
like a Mejiro" and whatever, but now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta be a bigger version of myself. All right!
Time to face forward and break away into the
future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer. In a family brimming with
excellence, she's one of the Umamusume who
tends to gets overlooked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always worked for a graceful, elegant
running style befitting of a Mejiro, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Aw, maaan... Dang it! Last place!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm so cooked. A Mejiro can't come in last!
Everyone'll look down on me at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's never managed to get great results running
that way. However, one day, a freestyle race is
held outside Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I should give this whole "freestyle racing"
thing a try. Yeah, I can run however I'd like here!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you got it! This time, I'll run like never
before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Watch me snatch the win and burn this run into
your memories!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, everyone's so fired up... Hehe, and
seriously, for me? I don't think I've ever heard my
name called out so much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm SO hyped up right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She breaks free from her family's expectations
and comes into her own with her explosive
runaway style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as they say, birds of a feather flock together.
It's not long before she becomes fast friends with
another explosive front runner.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Mornin', bestie! How're you doing, Palmster? ☆
Wahey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wahey-hey, Helios! What's up, sunshine? Listen,
I'm finally gonna make my debut in the Twinkle
Series! The date's been decided and everything!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For reals?! Like, real life for reals?! Is it finally
time for you to spread your wings?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You got me gagged with this news! That's hella
lit! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! ☆ You're gonna do great, sis! I believe
in you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Daitaku Helios. She's a friend of Mejiro
Palmer and the one who taught her how much fun
front running can be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two have been growing steadily closer as the
days have gone by. As a result...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna get the deets straight for my debut,
but what race do you think I should go for? Like,
if you ask me, the peak distance would be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ah, sorry! I didn't mean to hit you with
slang. It's rude to talk to you so casually, so I'll
stop...
choice_data_list:
No need. I'd rather you be yourself than act all
formal.

No need. I'd rather you be yourself than act all
formal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What?! You mean you want me to keep using
slang?
choice_data_list: Yeah, be the party girl of the Mejiro family.
Yeah, be the party girl of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Do you really mean that? Like, no cap?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yo, that's so based! ♪ You're, like, so much more
alive when you're being your authentic self and
not pretending to be all prim and proper! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The world'll be shooketh after seeing your mad
breakaway speed and hearing you stack on the
slang during your interview! There's no way you
won't make waves!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that idea is high-key gas, girl! Like, can
you imagine me slangmaxxing during the winner's
interview?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I gotta hardcore cram more slang words if I wanna
do that for real...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'd for sure make a name for myself if I did that,
though. And it won't be 'cause I'm a Mejiro, but
'cause I'm Palmer, the gal who ran free.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Should we do it, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's go big or go home!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You coming along for the ride, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Heck yeah, count me in! ☆ Let's do thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. My goal's to break away from
my straightlaced self and all the Mejiro etiquette
that's been hammered into me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep, it's official! I'm runnin' as the Mejiro fam's
ultimate party girl, and I'm gonna win, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then, I'm gonna go down in history—my way! Not
as a Mejiro, but as Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is set. Mejiro Palmer doesn't just want to
win—she wants to dominate as the party girl of
the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right! Are you two ready for this?! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No more being the peacemaker for me! It's time
for me to blast off and run away into the future!
Woo!
